series_metadata.series_description: Hard copy of dispensing and Patient Care System (PCS) transactions. Includes patient name, drug name and strength, quantity, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 3 years from the date of dispensing, then destroy. NOTE: Maintain in a readily retrievable manner. Keep in chronological order in a separate file at the licensed location where the drug was dispensed. ; Electronic: Retain 3 years from the date of dispensing, then destroy. NOTE: Maintain in a readily retrievable manner. Keep in chronological order in a separate file at the licensed location where the drug was dispensed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
